roster.name: The Ashen Widow
roster.title: She Who Buried Three Worlds
roster.description: Found at the edge of a collapsed civilization, she neither speaks nor weeps. The scholar's notes read: 'She remembers everything. That is her curse.'

roster.name: Hollowed Sentinel
roster.title: Last Guard of a Forgotten Gate
roster.description: It was still standing at its post when the scholar found it. The gate it guarded no longer exists. Neither does the kingdom that built it. It did not seem to care.

roster.name: The Pale Cartographer
roster.title: Mapper of Unmade Places
roster.description: His maps show places that do not exist yet. Or perhaps no longer exist. The scholar cannot tell the difference. Neither can he.

roster.name: Ember Wraith
roster.title: What the Fire Left Behind
roster.description: Not a ghost. Not alive. The scholar writes: 'It is the shape that fire makes when it misses someone.'

roster.name: The Fractured Judge
roster.title: Verdicts Without a Court
roster.description: It still passes judgment. On what, exactly, remains unclear. The scholar stopped asking after the third visit.

roster.name: Rot Pilgrim
roster.title: Eternal Traveller, No Destination
roster.description: It has been walking for longer than the scholar's entire bloodline has existed. When asked where it is going, it simply continues walking.

roster.name: Fractured Shade
roster.title: A Memory With No Owner
roster.description: The scholar's notes are unusually short for this entry. Just three words: 'Do not linger.'

roster.name: Nameless Soldier
roster.title: Fought For a Flag He Can't Recall
roster.description: His armor bears insignia from three different armies. He does not remember serving any of them. The scholar found him still at attention.

roster.name: The Ink Penitent
roster.title: Covered in Words No One Wrote
roster.description: Every surface of its body is covered in scripture. The scholar spent a week transcribing it. The text keeps changing.

roster.name: Hollow Lullaby
roster.title: Sings to Children That No Longer Exist
roster.description: The scholar notes: 'I hear it before I see it. It is always singing. I have not yet determined if this is comforting or terrible. Perhaps both.'

roster.name: The Waiting Room
roster.title: Still Expecting Someone
roster.description: Not a person. A place that learned to walk. The scholar notes: 'It follows me now. I try not to sit down near it.'

roster.name: Greymantle
roster.title: Wore Someone Else's Grief
roster.description: It is draped in mourning clothes that do not fit. The scholar could not determine who they were made for. Greymantle does not seem to know either.

roster.name: The Mute Herald
roster.title: Carries News From Nowhere
roster.description: It arrives with scrolls it cannot read, to deliver messages it cannot speak, for recipients that no longer exist. The scholar accepted one anyway.

roster.name: Thinthread
roster.title: Holds Things Together Barely
roster.description: It is made entirely of knotted string. The scholar is afraid to ask what the string used to be. Some knots look like they were tied in a hurry.

roster.name: Last Hymn
roster.title: The Final Note of a Dead Religion
roster.description: The scholar writes: 'I found it in the ruins of a temple whose god I cannot identify. It was the only thing still standing. It hummed when I approached. I hummed back. I am not sure why.'
